added_paragraphs: - User Content: When you use our Service, we collect personal information that is included in user prompts or inputs to the Service (like the text, photos and images, file uploads, and other materials you submit to Grok) ("Input") and outputs of the Service (like the text responses Grok generates based on your Input) ("Output") (together, "User Content"). If you include personal information in Inputs you provide to the Service, this information may be reproduced in the Output. Please do not share any personal information (including any sensitive information) in your Input to the Service.

- Feedback Data: Where applicable, we will collect your Feedback (as defined in our Terms of Service). This might arise if, for example, in a given conversation with Grok, you report that Grok returned inaccurate information in an Output or you rate an Output to your Input using the thumbs-up/thumbs-down icons.

Parents of teenagers between the ages of 13 and 18 years old must agree to the Terms of Service and are urged to exercise care in monitoring the use of this Service by their teenagers. The Service may have content such as some suggestive dialogue, coarse language, crude humor, sexual situations, or violence.

modified_paragraphs.after: Last Updated: December 20, 2024 (previous version)
modified_paragraphs.before: Last Updated: November 11, 2024 (previous version)

modified_paragraphs.after: At X.AI LLC ("xAI", "our", "us" or "we"), we value your privacy and are committed to being fair, accountable, and transparent in how we handle your personal information. Our Privacy Policy outlines how we collect and use your personal information when you use our websites, products, applications, and other xAI services (our "Service"). It also describes your privacy rights.
modified_paragraphs.before: At X.AI Corp. ("xAI", "our", "us" or "we"), we value your privacy and are committed to being fair, accountable, and transparent in how we handle your personal information. Our Privacy Policy outlines how we collect and use your personal information when you use our websites, products, applications, and other xAI services (our "Service"). It also describes your privacy rights.

modified_paragraphs.after: This Privacy Policy does not apply to data that we process on behalf of our enterprise or business customers, data accessed through our API, which is governed by customer terms. If you access Grok on a website controlled by one of our customers, the customer's privacy policy or other agreement between you and them, and not this Privacy Policy, would apply to such processing. If you wish to discontinue such processing or otherwise exercise your rights with respect to such personal information, please contact the company on whose behalf we are processing such data. For example, your use of X (previously Twitter), including use of Grok on X, is governed by the X Privacy Policy and X Terms, not this xAI Privacy Policy.
modified_paragraphs.before: This Privacy Policy does not apply to data that we process on behalf of our enterprise or business customers, such as information managed through our API. Our processing of such data is governed by the terms and agreements established with each customer. If you wish to exercise your rights with respect to personal information processed under those agreements, please contact the company on whose behalf we are processing such data. They maintain control over your information and are responsible for addressing any requests.

modified_paragraphs.after: When you use our Service or communicate with us, you provide certain personal information. This may include:
modified_paragraphs.before: When you use our Service, communicate with us, or apply for a job, you provide certain personal information. This may include:

modified_paragraphs.after: - Account Data: When an xAI account is required to access the Service, we will collect your name, contact information, account credentials, and, where payment is required, Payment Data (described below). If you register or log into our Service using another service, that service will send your information to us. For example, when you use your existing X credentials to access the Service on an xAI mobile app or website, X shares the following information with us at your direction: Twitter/X handle/username; your publicly visible name on X; numeric Twitter ID; the URL to your profile picture; and whether you are subscribed to X Premium.
modified_paragraphs.before: Account Data: When an xAI account is required to access the Service, we will collect your name, contact information, account credentials, and, where payment is required, Payment Data (described below). If you register or log into our Service using another service, that service will send your information to us. For example, when you use your existing X credentials to access the Service on an xAI website, X shares the following information with us at your direction: Twitter/X handle/username; your publicly visible name on X; numeric Twitter ID; the URL to your profile picture; and whether you are subscribed to X Premium.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Payment Data: Where payment is required to access the Service, we may collect payment information (such as payment card information) directly from you and details regarding your transactions with us.
modified_paragraphs.before: Payment Data: Where payment is required to access the Service, we may collect payment information (such as payment card information) directly from you and details regarding your transactions with us.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Contact and Communications Data: If you communicate with us, we will collect contact information such as your name, email address, any other contact details you voluntarily choose to provide us, and any additional information you provide in your communications with us.
modified_paragraphs.before: Contact and Communications Data: If you communicate with us, we will collect contact information such as your name, email address, any other contact details you voluntarily choose to provide us, and any additional information you provide in your communications with us.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Applicant Data: If you apply for a job or role with xAI, we will collect your personal information such as your contact details, resume/CV, education and work history, visa status, and other information obtained during interviews (including interview recordings and screenshots, where permissible). You also may choose to provide your gender, ethnicity, veteran status, disability status, and links to your website, blog, portfolio, LinkedIn or other public profiles.
modified_paragraphs.before: Applicant Data: If you apply for a job or role with xAI, we will collect your personal information such as your contact details, resume/CV, education and work history, visa status, and other information obtained during interviews (including interview recordings and screenshots, where permissible). You also may choose to provide your gender, ethnicity, veteran status, disability status, and links to your website, blog, portfolio, LinkedIn or other public profiles.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Social Media Information: We have pages on social media sites like Instagram, Facebook, Medium, X, YouTube and LinkedIn. When you interact with our social media pages, we collect personal information that you choose to provide to us, such as your contact details (collectively, “Social Data”). In addition, the companies that host our social media pages may provide us with aggregate information and analytics about our social media activity.
modified_paragraphs.before: Social Media Information: We have pages on social media sites like Instagram, Facebook, Medium, X, YouTube and LinkedIn. When you interact with our social media pages, we collect personal information that you choose to provide to us, such as your contact details (collectively, “Social Data”). In addition, the companies that host our social media pages may provide us with aggregate information and analytics about our social media activity.

modified_paragraphs.after: 2.2 Personal information we collect automatically
modified_paragraphs.before: 2.2 Personal information we collect when you use Grok

modified_paragraphs.after: - Device data: Technical information such as your IP address, device type, country from which you access, browser type and version, browser plug-in types and versions, operating system.
modified_paragraphs.before: Device data: Technical information such as your IP address, device type, country from which you access, browser type and version, browser plug-in types and versions, operating system.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Usage data: Information about your use of the Service, pages you view, date and time of your visit, duration of visits, pages visited, browsing history, search history, traffic data, standard server log information, and other communication data.
modified_paragraphs.before: Usage data: Information about your use of the Service, pages you view, date and time of your visit, duration of visits, pages visited, browsing history, search history, traffic data, standard server log information, and other communication data.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Inferred location data: your country-level, state-level and city-level location based on the IP address.
modified_paragraphs.before: Inferred location data: your country-level, state-level and city-level location based on the IP address.

modified_paragraphs.after: 2.3 Personal information from other sources
modified_paragraphs.before: 2.4 Personal information from other sources

modified_paragraphs.after: - Publicly available data: We collect a variety of information that is publicly available on the internet to train and develop the models that power our Service. In some instances, this information may include personal information (for example, information about politicians, celebrities, published authors or other public figures) and sensitive information (for example, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, or information concerning sexual orientation, among others). For more information on the sources of information used to develop our large language models, see our consumer FAQs.
modified_paragraphs.before: Publicly Available Data: We collect a variety of information that is publicly available on the internet to train and develop the models that power our Service. In some instances, this information may include personal information (for example, information about politicians, celebrities, published authors or other public figures) and sensitive information (for example, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, or information concerning sexual orientation, among others).

modified_paragraphs.after: - Public X posts and internet search data: The Service collects public posts shared on X, engagement data such as number of followers, and number of views, likes, reposts, shares, and replies. In response to search queries, the Service may conduct real-time web search of public results from the internet. In some instances, this data may include personal information.
modified_paragraphs.before: Internet Search Data: In responding to search queries, some aspects of the Service may include the ability to conduct a real-time web search of public results from the internet. In some instances, this data may include personal information.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Datasets we license from third party businesses.
modified_paragraphs.before: Licensed Datasets: Datasets we license from third party businesses.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Mailing addresses, job titles, email addresses, phone numbers, intent data (or user behavior data), IP addresses, social media profiles, LinkedIn URLs, and custom profiles.

modified_paragraphs.after: - Resumes, reference information, and background check information.
modified_paragraphs.before: Resumes, reference information, and background check information.

modified_paragraphs.after: - To process payments for our Service: We may process payment data in relation to access to certain features of our Service, as applicable.
modified_paragraphs.before: To process payments for our Service: We may process payment data in relation to access to certain features of our Service, as applicable.

modified_paragraphs.after: - To provide and maintain our Service: We use your personal information to provide and maintain our Service (including to provide Output in response to Input).
modified_paragraphs.before: To provide and maintain our Service: We use your personal information to provide and maintain our Service (including to provide Output in response to Input).

modified_paragraphs.after: - To provide support and assistance in relation to our Service, including to communicate with you and respond to your enquiries: We use your personal information to troubleshoot and diagnose problems, provide customer care and support services.
modified_paragraphs.before: To provide support and assistance in relation to our Service, including to communicate with you and respond to your enquiries: We use your personal information to troubleshoot and diagnose problems, provide customer care and support services.

modified_paragraphs.after: - To develop and improve our Service: We use your personal information for research and development purposes, to analyze trends to identify future opportunities for the development, promotion, and improvement of our Service. For example, as noted above, we may process (i) publicly available data, (ii) User Content you provide to us, and (iii) Feedback Data you volunteer, to train and improve the models that power our Service.
modified_paragraphs.before: To develop and improve our Service: We use your personal information for research and development purposes, to analyze trends to identify future opportunities for the development, promotion, and improvement of our Service. For example, we process Publicly Available Data and User Content to train and improve the models that power our Service.

modified_paragraphs.after: - To ensure the security and integrity of our Service: We process your information to protect the security of the Service and our systems, and to detect and prevent fraud, unauthorized use, unlawful activity, and other misuses of our Service by reviewing your activity and User Content, investigating suspicious activity, and enforcing our terms and policies.
modified_paragraphs.before: To ensure the security and integrity of our Service: We process your information to protect the security of the Service and our systems, and to detect and prevent fraud, unauthorized use, unlawful activity, and other misuses of our Service by reviewing your activity and User Content, investigating suspicious activity, and enforcing our terms and policies.

modified_paragraphs.after: - To comply with our legal obligations: We process your personal information when cooperating with public and government authorities, courts or regulators in accordance with our legal obligations under applicable laws, to the extent this requires the processing or disclosure of personal information to protect our rights, or is necessary for protecting against misuse or abuse of our Service, protecting personal property or safety, pursuing remedies available to us and limiting our damages, complying with judicial proceedings, court orders or legal processes, or to respond to lawful requests.
modified_paragraphs.before: To comply with our legal obligations: We process your personal information when cooperating with public and government authorities, courts or regulators in accordance with our legal obligations under applicable laws, to the extent this requires the processing or disclosure of personal information to protect our rights, or is necessary for protecting against misuse or abuse of our Service, protecting personal property or safety, pursuing remedies available to us and limiting our damages, complying with judicial proceedings, court orders or legal processes, or to respond to lawful requests.

modified_paragraphs.after: - To process job applications: We process your personal information if you apply for a job or role with xAI, to evaluate your application and make hiring decisions, communicate with you and inform you of current and future career opportunities (unless you tell us that you do not want us to keep your details for such purposes), manage and improve our recruiting and hiring processes, conduct reference and background checks (where required or permitted by applicable local law), and to detect and prevent security incidents or other deceptive, fraudulent, or illegal activity.
modified_paragraphs.before: To process job applications: We process your personal information if you apply for a job or role with xAI, to evaluate your application and make hiring decisions, communicate with you and inform you of current and future career opportunities (unless you tell us that you do not want us to keep your details for such purposes), manage and improve our recruiting and hiring processes, conduct reference and background checks (where required or permitted by applicable local law), and to detect and prevent security incidents or other deceptive, fraudulent, or illegal activity.

modified_paragraphs.after: - For our business or commercial purposes: We may use your personal information for other legitimate business purposes, such as to identify new customers, data analysis, developing new products, identifying usage trends, and operating and expanding our business activities.

While we have taken measures to limit undesirable training data and outputs, Grok could produce output that is not appropriate for all ages.

While we have taken measures to limit undesirable training data and outputs, Grok could produce output that is not appropriate for all ages.

modified_paragraphs.after: If you are a child under the age of 13, please do not attempt to register for or otherwise use our Service. If we learn that we have inadvertently obtained personal information about a child under the age of 13 via our Service, or from any other source, then we will delete that information as soon as possible.

removed_paragraphs: When you use or interact with Grok, whether on X or on our Service, we collect certain information from or about you. This may include:

User Content: We collect personal information that is included in user prompts or inputs (like the text, photos, images, file uploads, and other materials you submit to Grok) ("Input") and the outputs generated by Grok (like the text responses that Grok generates based on your Input) ("Output") (together, "User Content"). If you include personal information in Inputs you provide to Grok, this information may be reproduced in the Output. Please do not share any personal information (including any sensitive information) in your Input to Grok.

Feedback Data: We may collect your suggestions, recommendations, or other feedback relating to Grok. This might arise if, for example, in a given conversation with Grok, you report that Grok returned inaccurate information in an Output or you rate an Output to your Input using the thumbs-up/thumbs-down icons. If you provide such feedback, we may collect it even if you have opted out of our use of your information to train our models.

Interaction Data: We also receive certain information about your use of Grok, such as the frequency and duration of interactions, the number and length of sessions, response times, and how often you use Grok over time. This may also include other usage data, such information about the features you engage with, the sequence of actions, and types of tasks performed.
We use this information to provide Grok's functionality to you, to improve your user experience, and to further train and improve our models.

Public X Posts: We collect public posts shared on X, which includes the content of public posts, the date shared, and engagement data such as the number of followers associated with the account as well as the number of views, likes, reposts, shares, and replies.

- You can object to processing of your personal information when our processing is based on our legitimate interests, ask us to restrict processing of your personal information or request portability of your personal information, (i.e., your data to be transferred in a readable and standardized format).
